sourceMovie.title: Twisters
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Twisters for the same reason it broke through in 2024: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a thriller rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Lee Isaac Chung keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The action and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: San Andreas
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Twisters clicked for you, San Andreas (2015) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Twisters?
faq.answer: Try San Andreas, Armageddon, Body of Lies—each shares DNA with Twisters while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Twisters?
faq.answer: Twisters (2024) is best described as Action, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Twisters part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Twister Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
